deadline: Quarterly deadlines: March 1st, June 1st, September 1st, December 1st
geographic_restrictions: New York City (Bronx, Brooklyn, Manhattan, Queens, Staten Island)
project_area: Community-based projects benefiting women and girls in NYC
demographic_requirements: Projects must directly benefit women and/or girls in New York City
eligibility_summary: Open to individuals and organizations based in NYC that are women-led or women-focused. Projects must be community-based, benefit women/girls, and align with focus areas such as economic empowerment, education, health, advocacy, entrepreneurship, or community transformation. Applicants must submit a detailed budget, project plan, and supporting documents.
